name: Data Distribution & Scalability
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 3 ysql_num_shards_per_tserver=2,yb_num_shards_per_tserver=2 && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → scale: ysql-load   (YSQL load generator)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → scale: ycql-load   (YCQL load generator)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → scale-demo           (guided scale-out demo)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → scale-ws             (Workshop shell for manual commands)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → scale: start all    (launch all three at once)"'
